FanBasis
Log In
                                The Operating System for Modern
                                
Digital Businesses
                                All-in-one software to run high-ticket, high-margin digital
                                businesses. Everything from checkout to fulfillment with
                                built-in financing, premium payments, and enterprise-grade
                                scale.
                            
                                Book a Demo Call
                            
Our Top Features
Crypto Payments
Automated Fulfillment
Order Bumps
Upsells
Custom Dashboards
7+ BNPL Providers

What We Do
                    High-Trust Infrastructure For 
High-Growth Businesses.
                
                    If you're selling knowledge, experience, or services
                    online—FanBasis was built to run your business end-to-end. From
                    payments to fulfillment, it's everything you need to sell smarter,
                    get paid faster, and scale without limits.
                
Sell
                            Unlock end-to-end growth tools — from hosting products to
                            processing payments — all in one powerful platform.
                        
Secure
                            Accept payments with confidence and get reliable payouts—for
                            you and your affiliates. Backed by infrastructure built to
                            protect your revenue at every step.
                        
Scale
                            From real-time dashboards and embedded BNPL to dedicated
                            automation and growth specialists, FanBasis treats your
                            business like the serious operation it is.
                        
Features
                    We're Not a Tool.
We're the Stack.
                
                    Most platforms stop at checkout. FanBasis is full-stack business
                    infrastructure powering the next generation of internet
                    entrepreneurs.
                
Reliable Payments
                                Built for how you sell—with custom checkout funnels,
                                scalable infra, and zero surprises.
                            
7000+ App Integrations
                                Plug into tools you already use—CRMs, workflows, and data
                                pipelines.
                            
Built-in Affiliate Engine
                                Track affiliates, pay commissions, and grow through
                                partners.
                            
Real-Time Analytics
                                Live dashboards with insights on churn, failed payments, and
                                buyer behavior.
                            
                                White Glove Onboarding & Migration
                            
                                Launch fast with expert-led setup and seamless migration of
                                your data, customers, and offers.
                            
Automated Fulfillment
                                Host and auto-deliver courses, communities, or services—with
                                done-for-you automation support.
                            
Features
                    Powerful Payment Tools, Optimized for Conversions
                
                    All the tools your business needs to maximize its revenue
                
Shareable Payment Links
                            Create products with a single click. Quick and seamless.
                        
Subscriptions
                            Bill clients on autopilot with built-in recurring logic.
                        
Upsells & OTOs
                            Fully customizable offers with forced VSLs, delayed CTAs, and
                            conversion-focused flow.
                        
Order Bumps
                            Add bonus offers at checkout to boost conversions instantly.
                        
In-house Payment Plans
                            Offer flexible installment options without third-party tools.
                        
Smart Payment Routing
                            Recover failed payments in real-time with intelligent fallback
                            logic.
                        
Free Trials
                            Convert first. Charge later. Full control over trial timing
                            and access.
                        
Maximum Speed
                            FanBasis is built for scale—no middleware, no lag.
                        
Payment Methods
                    Fully-Integrated 
Payment & Financing Options
                                    Rated 
4.95/5
 by over
                                    1000 users
                                
                                Glowing Testimonials that Speak Volumes
                            
                                                You Should Run Everything on FanBasis
                                            
                                                FanBasis has seriously accelerated our growth—it's the
                                                team behind it that really makes the difference.
                                                They're incredibly responsive, invested in our
                                                success. You'll quickly see just how much they care.
                                            
Rohan Sheth
GrowRev
                                                Payments Made Ridiculously Easy
                                            
                                                FanBasis completely simplified everything. It's
                                                straightforward, fast, and reliable, no matter if
                                                clients prefer cards, Apple Pay, or BNPL. It's exactly
                                                what we needed—simple, effective, and trustworthy.
                                            
Vincent Fisher
6 Figure Fitness
                                                Built Exactly for Agency Needs
                                            
                                                The flexibility to customize offers, create OTOs, and
                                                automate our sales funnels has been fantastic. Plus,
                                                the built-in analytics give us clear insights on
                                                performance, helping us make smarter decisions with
                                                our ads.
                                            
Kyle O'Connor
INBOUND
                                                Finally, a Platform That Understands Us
                                            
                                                FanBasis isn't just another tool—it's built by people
                                                who genuinely get us. Their real edge isn't just tech;
                                                it's understanding our needs before we ask. Plus,
                                                they've got SWAG—this is THE team to back your growth.
                                            
Devan Gockenbach
Creatify
                                                FanBasis Nailed Our Affiliate Marketing
                                            
                                                Their affiliate system got rid of our messy

llm_raw.description: An all-in-one ecommerce operating system designed for high-ticket digital businesses to manage payments, fulfillment, and affiliate marketing.
llm_raw.blocker: no public API documentation available; enterprise-focused model typically requires direct sales contact
llm_raw.notes: FanBasis positions itself as a white-glove, enterprise-grade platform. While they mention 7000+ integrations, public API documentation for developers is not exposed on their marketing site.
